description: These black and brown sandals from carlton london are a versatile pair that looks equally good teamed up with simple ethnic wear or simple casuals.Upper synthetic leather with textile lining and cutouts on top in an interesting interwoven design Synthetic leather footbed for long wearand comfort Outsole TPR outsole with thin tightly packed horizontal ridges for better grip shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
